scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace frontend && npm run test --prefix mobile
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspace frontend && npm run test --prefix mobile
scripts.check: npm run test:all && npm run build
scripts.quality: npm run verify:prisma && npm run test:all && npm run typecheck --workspace backend
